meta.title: Can a Fighter Pilot Win vs. A.I. Enemy DOGFIGHT in DCS?
meta.description:
Skip the waitlist and invest in blue-chip art for the very first time by signing up for Masterworks: https://masterworks.art/hasardlee. Purchase shares in great masterpieces from artists like Pablo Picasso, Banksy, Andy Warhol, and more.

A former F-16 fighter pilot battles an AI adversary in an aerial dogfight. With the AI predicting his every move, can he outmaneuver the computer? Will the training be enough to defeat the machine? 

WIN A FLIGHT IN A REAL FIGHTER JET 👉  giveaway has ended

Every 100th person wins a PATCH:  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

📷 Produced by:  Michael Cunningham. 

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen


Intro - 0:00
Battle Damage Check- 1:00
Advanced Handling 2:30
AI Assessment - 5:40
Offensive Dogfight - 8:15
High Aspect Dogfight - 9:53
Surprise Enemy - 15:50
Win a real jet flight 21:08

How Masterworks works:
-Create your account with your traditional bank account
-Pick major works of art to invest in or our new blue-chip diversified art portfolio
-Identify investment amount
-Hold shares in works by Picasso or trade them in our secondary marketplace
See important Masterworks disclosures: http://masterworks.com/cd
